error_signature: parent parameter is only considered when the issue type is a subtask
title: Jira parent parameter issue with non-subtask issue types
symptom: When trying to update or set the parent issue for a non-subtask issue type in Jira, the operation appears successful but does not reflect in Jira.
applies_when: Attempting to set parent for non-subtask issue types
root_cause: Jira's API only accepts a parent parameter for subtask issue types. Attempting to set a parent for other issue types like Tasks or Epics will not work due to Jira's hierarchy structure.
fix_steps: Identify the custom field ID in Jira that relates to the parent issue
Use the Expression editor in n8n to set this custom field ID in the Field ID field
Test the workflow to ensure the parent relationship is established correctly
agent_instruction: Set the custom field ID for the parent issue in the Jira node using the Expression editor.
